'''saporo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crackbrainedness|crackbrainedness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-p-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crackbrainedness|crackbrainedness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| saporo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæpereth|sæpereth]] || [[word:sæperej|sæperej]] || [[word:sæperesh|sæperesh]] || [[word:sæpere|sæpere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sapoporoth|sapoporoth]] || [[word:sapoporoj|sapoporoj]] || [[word:sapoporosh|sapoporosh]] || [[word:sapoporo|sapoporo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:saporoth|saporoth]] || [[word:saporoj|saporoj]] || [[word:saporosh|saporosh]] || [[word:saporo|saporo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sapofroth|sapofroth]] || [[word:sapofroj|sapofroj]] || [[word:sapofrosh|sapofrosh]] || [[word:sapofrof|sapofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:saporotho|saporotho]] || [[word:saporojo|saporojo]] || [[word:saporosho|saporosho]] || [[word:saporoko|saporoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:saporoth|saporoth]] || [[word:saporoj|saporoj]] || [[word:saporosh|saporosh]] || [[word:saporo|saporo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:saporothol|saporothol]] || [[word:saporojol|saporojol]] || [[word:saporoshol|saporoshol]] || [[word:saporokol|saporokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:saporothotho|saporothotho]] || [[word:saporojojo|saporojojo]] || [[word:saporoshosho|saporoshosho]] || [[word:saporoko|saporoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:saporothon|saporothon]] || [[word:saporojon|saporojon]] || [[word:saporoshon|saporoshon]] || [[word:saporokon|saporokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:saporothoro|saporothoro]] || [[word:saporojoro|saporojoro]] || [[word:saporoshoro|saporoshoro]] || [[word:saporokoro|saporokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
